name: State AG (CA-style)
nl_description: I'm in the California Attorney General's office. We need to track AI consumer protection enforcement, AI bias audit requirements, deepfake election laws, federal preemption fights post-SB1047, and major AI antitrust action by FTC and DOJ.

structured.notes: California AG office: focus on consumer protection enforcement, bias audits, deepfake election laws, post-SB1047 preemption battles, and federal antitrust action against major AI firms.
